title: Pictures of Us
overview: Nadima and her twin brother Dastaan are uprooted from their seemingly idyllic home where secrets are buried and appearance is all that matters and find themselves thrust into a world of drugs, violence and chaos.  Seduced by the fast talking and flirtatious Donny, Nadima becomes caught in a love triangle after meeting Donny’s best friend Jack. Dismissing her brother’s warnings. It isn’t long before the excitement of all that is new turns Nadima’s world into a nightmare.
